meanings.definition: be larger in number, quantity, power, status or importance
have dominance or the power to defeat over
examples: The methods can master the problems
the tragedy overshadowed the couple's happiness

meanings.definition: most powerful or important or influential
examples: D-day is considered the dominating event of the war in Europe

meanings.definition: used of a height or viewpoint
examples: a commanding view of the ocean
looked up at the castle dominating the countryside

meanings.definition: offensively self-assured or given to exercising usually unwarranted power
examples: a bossy way of ordering others around
a rather aggressive and dominating character
managed the employees in an aloof magisterial way
